3137410.name: Greed Forest Demo
3137410.description:
A real-time strategy tower defense game set in a dangerous yet resource-rich forest. Build your base, shape your defenses, and fend off relentless enemy swarms in a battle for survival and supremacy.

Gather and Grow:

Harvest gold, wood and stone from the forest to expand your base, unlock upgrades, and build advanced tech structures.

RTS Meets Tower Defense:

Experience the strategy of a classic RTS without unit micro-management. Focus entirely on defending against massive waves of enemies.

Campaign and Creativity:

Dive into a challenging campaign or use the built-in map editor to design and share your own custom scenarios.

Greed Forest is about mastering the balance between resource management, strategic planning, and creative defense.
3137410.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
